bridge_equation_v24.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v24 = mix(B_plastic_v23, L_reinforce, 1 - P_reinforce, D_feature_v18, 1 - G_brain_v18)
bridge_equation_v24.structure_term: B_struct_v24 = mix(B_struct_v23, S_reinforce, R_reinforce, 1 - P_reinforce, D_structure_v18)
bridge_equation_v24.readiness_term: R_train_v24 = mix(R_train_v23, B_plastic_v24, B_struct_v24, R_reinforce, D_align_v18, 1 - P_reinforce)

project_readout.summary: 训练终式第二十四桥开始吸收持续放大强化和脑编码第十八版，检查放大趋势是否开始转成更稳的规则层放大。
project_readout.next_question: 下一步要把第二十四桥并回主核，验证放大是否开始从轻度增强转向稳态增强。
